title: Security: Unretained() can be used for objects on the Oilpan heap
description_snippet:
I found several non-test instances.

https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/4038606 is the CL.

MemoryCache is created as a global Persistent singleton, so it should be OK: https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/blink/renderer/platform/loader/fetc
